subject: Keep the 2nd Blue on Jan 5th!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
body:
|
---

---
| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/EYk_dFlDEGTiEDSD3VJLwK_wvQUXjo_yH9JN-LOW6oA=/ZV97eniUcrMRMuyg2EahmSRZWIHOLmrZHVKdaf2t8l8=)
---
Friend Georgia isn't the only state with a special election on January 5th.
We have a big one right here in the Commonwealth.

Candi King is running in a snap special election to hold the 2nd House District in Stafford and Prince William County. **[We need to support ](https://act.myngp.com/el/EYk_dFlDEGTiEDSD3VJLwK_wvQUXjo_yH9JN-LOW6oA=/G-F3YHUvHmecaMEpDwkcyPZ-iaaPeNJ_T9Ih_2yGPyw=)[Candi to keep this district blue and keep our majority in the Virginia House of Delegates strong.](https://act.myngp.com/el/EYk_dFlDEGTiEDSD3VJLwK_wvQUXjo_yH9JN-LOW6oA=/G-F3YHUvHmecaMEpDwkcyPZ-iaaPeNJ_T9Ih_2yGPyw=)**

We have a big agenda going into the 2021 General Assembly session including investing in early childhood education, broadband access, vocational training, paid sick days and even legalizing marijuana. We need every seat and every vote in the House to get this agenda through.

**[Can you make a donation before the New Year 's Eve deadline?](https://act.myngp.com/el/EYk_dFlDEGTiEDSD3VJLwK_wvQUXjo_yH9JN-LOW6oA=/G-F3YHUvHmecaMEpDwkcyPZ-iaaPeNJ_T9Ih_2yGPyw=)**

Your donation will give Candi and her team the resources they need to win on January 5th.

Thank you for everything you did in 2020 and we can't wait to keep the progress going into 2021.

| Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
Richmond VA 23218 [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/EYk_dFlDEGTiEDSD3VJLwK_wvQUXjo_yH9JN-LOW6oA=/znIGDEVJQS_jxg9TAq7e1c83oeBO5LrQbKAfSWmBhSs=) |

name: True the Vote
subject: Citizen Challenges: How They Work and Why It Matters
body:
Stay Informed and Educated
| | | | [](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZjaXRpemVuLWNoYWxsZW5nZXMtaG93LXRoZXktd29yay1hbmQtd2h5LWl0LW1hdHRlcnMlMkY=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=347A826A20A3666)
---
| | At True the Vote, a part of our mission is to empower and equip citizens to ensure a process that's fair and open which is why we have filed Elector Challenges on behalf of Georgia voters in counties across the state.

It's critical that the American people understand how their elections and work - including citizen challenges. Citizen challenges exist to verify that a vote is being cast legally, that it is valid, that the elector is an eligible, resident voter, and that therefore all the citizens of the state are protected against any subversion of the process or outcome.

Learn more about the challenges we filed in Georgia as well as how citizen challenges work to help do your part in keeping Americans informed and educated.

---
| | [ LEARN ABOUT CHALLENGES ](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZjaXRpemVuLWNoYWxsZW5nZXMtaG93LXRoZXktd29yay1hbmQtd2h5LWl0LW1hdHRlcnMlMkY=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=347A826A20A3666)

| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE TUESDAY, DECEMBER 29, 2020
LOEFFLER RESPONDS TO EVIDENCE OF CHILD ABUSE AT WARNOCK'S SUMMER CAMP
ATLANTA - In case you missed it, bombshell evidence has proven that child abuse occurred under Raphael Warnock's purview at Camp Farthest Out in the early 2000s. As first [reported](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ai6rL_AvT9g_dvzREIvovrN0FnTlJSNuC-gW15-KNUD5B8EsL8DUYw81D-rNdrRHWD2XMTVtFP7xJmcH24yxv1y8qi5VCs1hW-gGwhPC0JNQ1h8X7QfgG0CPhrZjDmYwgfTmVykswBHXoEhpdUDAfvipsGtBZxJc7ie7VxpHmnK_fIqKxIzC5Uz-yXYDIIlN04jtGoLzjd9uoHYWzSQf6LICkbvmZZKg&c=pX4usaSANXyCcSKf4VKUmDhTKrkAv-_o1hpH_URuO99MgUO3zjAerg==&ch=BGhgIdG1EbHp96AZJCNigFU61uxfag7PU3pzYfABSHl7izSmFjA-aA==) by the Washington Free Beacon, one of the campers confirmed the extent of the abuse he suffered while attending Warnock's camp in a shocking, on-the-record statement. Reacting to the report, Senator Kelly Loeffler [told ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ai6rL_AvT9g_dvzREIvovrN0FnTlJSNuC-gW15-KNUD5B8EsL8DUY4WFUC4KmIkLvEFqtBnEhrWDiX9Vk9dnLrAD9bSSdyudLIMhNbfMz8ZjbrWZgraiEUpmR73MWs-19VQMkact1AhV7FwO9ThefbMY-aPwUA_RCzH_-syS3SAQNX_DSjmMAKMfph7XpmKt1_VE7ZPmMriMQ-n7sKmL7D6mixqYLtsS&c=pX4usaSANXyCcSKf4VKUmDhTKrkAv-_o1hpH_URuO99MgUO3zjAerg==&ch=BGhgIdG1EbHp96AZJCNigFU61uxfag7PU3pzYfABSHl7izSmFjA-aA==)Fox News, "It's disgusting. It's really alarming and should be disqualifying."
This morning, Senator Loeffler joined Fox & Friends to hammer Raphael Warnock for his [refusal](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ai6rL_AvT9g_dvzREIvovrN0FnTlJSNuC-gW15-KNUD5B8EsL8DUY4WFUC4KmIkLEQQQWQAYWIV2K9SX5UURBH5WZKRvC-N3IaKtuLMyVNzpVOPVRwu0D-71-kmO2GECUsjRU8vUiOhkfqfvk9vJhKjM9bW6NH2Shxo_i5r9AOr4m3cBwxG6Vjxld_HD61cbOzUF6Cqafamz3Sxdo9JTClcWQtPIRkQkjCHTAYtFjA1iUJmaDI7KLYFxCTKossj8KO5YE6EAcLn9tBIEpbf2EBQaU0uf3jKCu23zDHQ5gUxBFxYRioutFBOXOvwdBpZqfj3b_d_-eHfhnmWWuppfqg1Chk3lQ0J4frnbABq_ZSw=&c=pX4usaSANXyCcSKf4VKUmDhTKrkAv-_o1hpH_URuO99MgUO3zjAerg==&ch=BGhgIdG1EbHp96AZJCNigFU61uxfag7PU3pzYfABSHl7izSmFjA-aA==) to answer any questions about what happened during his year supervising the camp. Click [HERE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ai6rL_AvT9g_dvzREIvovrN0FnTlJSNuC-gW15-KNUD5B8EsL8DUY4WFUC4KmIkLWGFdrr3-N-1p3MmQgCUMfjpr7sEiEhROhiwde-K1zffyZ0YsIxIJu1VHpYLA54G74qicZg61-8gVWfew5RK6yaI0ZsDxnsjpe8LYBP4P78NKXsgNGdEOTRBlelOIcjNcuwgSOXvzxVQ=&c=pX4usaSANXyCcSKf4VKUmDhTKrkAv-_o1hpH_URuO99MgUO3zjAerg==&ch=BGhgIdG1EbHp96AZJCNigFU61uxfag7PU3pzYfABSHl7izSmFjA-aA==) or on the photo below to watch.

Every dollar you give will have twice the impact over these next 72 hours. Can you make a donation right now and help us reach our goal? [] [] Thank you, [] -- Mary Mancini Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party [] PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR. GEETA MCMILLAN, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE. We only have TWO DAYS until our FINAL deadline before the runoffs and we still have a lot of catching up to do. Will you help us defend Georgia AND our Republican Senate Majority by rushing in a 5X MATCHED contribution today? Dear Friend, Ahead of our END-OF-YEAR DEADLINE, it seems like things are just getting worse and worse in Georgia. Polls show that our Republican candidates are starting to fall behind. Chuck Schumer and Hollywood celebrities are rushing HUNDREDS OF MILLIONS to the Democratic candidates. And now, my finance team just told me that we are still $423,901 BEHIND our end-of-year goal. **[Can you rush in $10 right now to close the gap?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AvBuPKDLHBzPDUtu6Nx2OxZa9uBYi9rsUTpARZgAFSyOPmUfZQzQWDhjxuxuftoihyz0QHvuAkSNrpwOthty2Ns-Grw9gIS-5jgLr_L6CZT6z12n2nXE1izhmDtoDfSoGrjU_3A2JCG9GoXXnEEb1Qb9d8EWmGYHDB7RiEDeLV4jPwb5MOwciC8cFoklbbz1M8q44zwyCVj6FqS8uJGNmVe_vaAMzJIIE2tbIv5RNDwQqNuoH2b2OVueIT_eNTVsoH0k4GSa4YmNaFxL3cu2FGTzsfjBqcHJPpp5l2FKKEDGSaCXleONn7CDvVmiZFsQplgMcXHpWDLGp5Mmbwutx2ZSWpJZ5NU-MvRHY14v9u40GqwG63erCljjdbiHwmV9AleXgWD2-2-XpGEc6ee6YgCUzulpBBgmxxBX8Cw8yNU3Y6gRukJCHbkzQV4YNf6ap--cY4KbYVQ=&c=fJnMN-GcbG_ZVCMHuJB5s1SjrBJKNTuBydGI8tWbQWZ3UL2Vf__pBQ==&ch=HxHtQ2x_F8gqkkHtYlaniPi2PCdX-wIWdEVLJM5RxCeAGbt_hVHIcw==) The House Majority hinges on this seat. That's why your support is so critical. With only 2 days to go, we have to act now.**

We only recently flipped this seat from BLUE to RED -- putting us at the top of Nancy Pelosi's list of targets. They outspent us 3:1, plastered ads across California's 48th district that intentionally misled voters and distorted Michelle's record, AND spent more dark money against us than any other race in the nation.

Now, with Nancy Pelosi's Majority hanging on by a thread, there's no doubt the Democrats will double down and spend millions more attacking us. Without you, we don't stand a chance. [**So please, if you 're able, can you rush in a donation before Friday's FEC deadline? It's our FINAL deadline of 2020.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AvBuPKDLHBzPDUtu6Nx2OxZa9uBYi9rsUTpARZgAFSyOPmUfZQzQWPb92Cn7wOhoSI1nfLhmP24t_k2TjHxZA4ShJJz1og5BPZumtKzDn-m9xLGcKrTveexfwoRSPEOmn-zoCMj5zfLZ9LHhO5hi_6UKxeHY8GsmT0bMUyQIuMk39GNUp68s7TKHWDExHnc_PiBDHKYQmxHHzOdou-wF60SW06OzSQBSk01PT0_pWy0R5xXTcyAE8OM0f2oy57TTpSJsaAuv_WG00bYt8w_6jsRA0QswbZyiv1XWBIv5Bd7FMXSE5erxk7XeAnqzwgtJmZIRMhBMPhiCobvdwbV12qY5B0hzTGjIWXnQG4KTmM3U9RbUE8IPs6sJcPrhhjb7DYIwqUaPQKlDqxyjzekwBCkvIPvcBYHck2V9PfdNvX9Ok9PMUpNSwQ==&c=fJnMN-GcbG_ZVCMHuJB5s1SjrBJKNTuBydGI8tWbQWZ3UL2Vf__pBQ==&ch=HxHtQ2x_F8gqkkHtYlaniPi2PCdX-wIWdEVLJM5RxCeAGbt_hVHIcw==)

After coming to America as a young woman, Michelle watched her mother fall victim to a broken political system. Her single mother was wrongly taxed, but her mother lacked the resources to fight back for her small business. As a proud conservative woman, Michelle continues to fight on behalf of taxpayers -- keeping more of your paycheck in your wallet. _But she can't win this fight alone._

[**Can you chip in $10 before MIDNIGHT on FRIDAY?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AvBuPKDLHBzPDUtu6Nx2OxZa9uBYi9rsUTpARZgAFSyOPmUfZQzQWDhjxuxuftoihyz0QHvuAkSNrpwOthty2Ns-Grw9gIS-5jgLr_L6CZT6z12n2nXE1izhmDtoDfSoGrjU_3A2JCG9GoXXnEEb1Qb9d8EWmGYHDB7RiEDeLV4jPwb5MOwciC8cFoklbbz1M8q44zwyCVj6FqS8uJGNmVe_vaAMzJIIE2tbIv5RNDwQqNuoH2b2OVueIT_eNTVsoH0k4GSa4YmNaFxL3cu2FGTzsfjBqcHJPpp5l2FKKEDGSaCXleONn7CDvVmiZFsQplgMcXHpWDLGp5Mmbwutx2ZSWpJZ5NU-MvRHY14v9u40GqwG63erCljjdbiHwmV9AleXgWD2-2-XpGEc6ee6YgCUzulpBBgmxxBX8Cw8yNU3Y6gRukJCHbkzQV4YNf6ap--cY4KbYVQ=&c=fJnMN-GcbG_ZVCMHuJB5s1SjrBJKNTuBydGI8tWbQWZ3UL2Vf__pBQ==&ch=HxHtQ2x_F8gqkkHtYlaniPi2PCdX-wIWdEVLJM5RxCeAGbt_hVHIcw==) With the House Majority on the line and the Democrats already organizing against us, there's simply too much on the line for you to sit this one out.

things aren't looking good.

Friend -- things aren't looking good. We are **$50,983.89** away from our end-of-year goal, and our donations have slowed by over 50% in the past few weeks.

It's crunch time, Friend. If we don't reach this goal, all of our efforts in the final days of this runoff will have to be slashed. That means our GOTV efforts will be limited and our TV ads will have to be cut back.

Something else entirely? == With only 2 days left in December, this is your last chance to take the official Team Young December priorities survey and we're waiting for your feedback. As a member of our grassroots team, Young is counting on you to make your voice heard! == | == == From fighting for our veterans to victims of domestic abuse, Young has always put the needs of our community first. As an immigrant and proud conservative woman, she's no stranger to the Left's attacks. They spent $20+ million against her because she's exactly who they don't want in Congress. Young will always fight for us. == We're all ears, Martin Team Young Paid for by Young Kim for Congress PO Box 2186 Fullerton CA, 92837 == ** ** | | Young Kim for Congress | PO Box 2186, Fullerton, CA 92837 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

body:
Can you rush in a contribution to defend this seat from Pelosi's never-ending campaign war chest? The FEC's end of quarter deadline is just 48 hours away and we remain one of Pelosi's top-targets.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001o7TU62ffY8LH_fAyqgPI8iROUysWGfI28YULe59mEAlBYJ4aezWg356KvaFAWfdmM7wnXyzr8Z7Z2w9N4B_G--7ds6wkiRBZiwhzdjjQjZh6SnwMkTNyuMp9NUpBX6U3SaQ7YBePtZNEkC1OpTwCpjE8zapBA8N4802A61qmGuxRl3Sq244YWHmgLSGLThAHlJRlv_kV6gJev057zp-jxCYvk9SYa4DGQFnIR8iKM9pTK0VNucVwX2iav6XtTij1y9B8jYZfdF2_VOyojacOVeDF3WGGPleihY1eFoGJ8Tbt3Lg4mmMgP_JURfs_b7a18WYKpUFqWFIEliteh-EVWmdg2cvpNU4wvzpsaiMrgHNuWB3CJDeiZY7yD93gHCvPXNBDjcgvY3WIvuDVFRNGLu2Pugbxf68T_JD45_p-sFJ_PDGmB6hYu7afSmAx4f7U&c=tSl2nPQx-sr0IlpFE0u8ZDnAZJxJhWMP6-rK0RtqNxODeDDz_RMYRQ==&ch=PQb21PFF5GxPWAwcyEcvZN1u7CE4phDuzaD2sBUXeiEw5IjFeRrysA==)

Friend,

Young Kim is an immigrant and life-long conservative fighting for lower taxes, fewer regulations, affordable healthcare, and a pro-business environment. She's been a leader on the issues of affordability and homelessness -- the issues Californians face every day -- and will continue to lead in Washington:

_That means lower taxes and fewer taxes, leaving more of your paycheck in your wallet. That means getting rid of red tape that is burdening small businesses, allowing them to thrive. That means building a better, brighter future for California, providing hardworking Americans with more opportunities._

But our ability to do all that relies on the support of grassroots supporters, like you, Friend, chipping in what you can to help fight off Pelosi's army and defend this seat from the Far Left.

**With the FEC 's end of quarter deadline just 48 hours away and the House Majority within reach, we need you to take action. [Chip in HERE before FRIDAY at MIDNIGHT to take back the House for Republicans.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001o7TU62ffY8LH_fAyqgPI8iROUysWGfI28YULe59mEAlBYJ4aezWg32KGtVKvi5gfjQPejr3Nh2Dw9D-uKNrRLbVbju9vvF1__uoMKKQWWezZB4NjHi0y-MLD3uIonsjnDjhLH4lIBlMyu2RWZoqP8zvE7qNdVcyAkW81LcDxYdXLOVqGyBOm9smVWe7vY_iTJVp9mIUtHNJsj9hlMyGCylbjGM0UdEEXZkzhPuOGCANTyXg6cBGBTgF5kqkeoWo-EvtRTKDjVVP157bVk1a0CKQuWmLh9s3vEXINh9LE7BDdbCBcqqWgqlKA9jZSj3k-8AwdJtkZdxmgK3uhi_hyg4UrCFYpzm6YiBQ6K--6kYrboSN5Atu2O5fuVCOCWJzQOXkuWg_lQS6knZYtRO6bElq1XrWwi7nDR75iwl_xARjtSvXI7gTYOs1YdahB1GQk&c=tSl2nPQx-sr0IlpFE0u8ZDnAZJxJhWMP6-rK0RtqNxODeDDz_RMYRQ==&ch=PQb21PFF5GxPWAwcyEcvZN1u7CE4phDuzaD2sBUXeiEw5IjFeRrysA==)**

We flipped this seat from BLUE to RED, and now Nancy Pelosi is dead set on defeating us. California's 39th Congressional District is the second most blue seat held by a Republican making it a toss-up and a top-target. Pelosi's flooded this district with $20+ million over the last four years and is ready to spend even more to buy this seat out from under us -- because control of the House Majority could come down to this seat.

**[Can you rush in a contribution to defend this seat from Pelosi's never-ending campaign war chest?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001o7TU62ffY8LH_fAyqgPI8iROUysWGfI28YULe59mEAlBYJ4aezWg32KGtVKvi5gfjQPejr3Nh2Dw9D-uKNrRLbVbju9vvF1__uoMKKQWWezZB4NjHi0y-MLD3uIonsjnDjhLH4lIBlMyu2RWZoqP8zvE7qNdVcyAkW81LcDxYdXLOVqGyBOm9smVWe7vY_iTJVp9mIUtHNJsj9hlMyGCylbjGM0UdEEXZkzhPuOGCANTyXg6cBGBTgF5kqkeoWo-EvtRTKDjVVP157bVk1a0CKQuWmLh9s3vEXINh9LE7BDdbCBcqqWgqlKA9jZSj3k-8AwdJtkZdxmgK3uhi_hyg4UrCFYpzm6YiBQ6K--6kYrboSN5Atu2O5fuVCOCWJzQOXkuWg_lQS6knZYtRO6bElq1XrWwi7nDR75iwl_xARjtSvXI7gTYOs1YdahB1GQk&c=tSl2nPQx-sr0IlpFE0u8ZDnAZJxJhWMP6-rK0RtqNxODeDDz_RMYRQ==&ch=PQb21PFF5GxPWAwcyEcvZN1u7CE4phDuzaD2sBUXeiEw5IjFeRrysA==) The FEC's end of quarter deadline is just 48 hours away and we remain one of Pelosi's top-targets.**

Thank you,

Taylor

clean_body: Can you rush in a contribution to defend this seat from Pelosi's never-ending campaign war chest? The FEC's end of quarter deadline is just 48 hours away and we remain one of Pelosi's top-targets. == Friend, Young Kim is an immigrant and life-long conservative fighting for lower taxes, fewer regulations, affordable healthcare, and a pro-business environment. She's been a leader on the issues of affordability and homelessness -- the issues Californians face every day -- and will continue to lead in Washington: That means lower taxes and fewer taxes, leaving more of your paycheck in your wallet. That means getting rid of red tape that is burdening small businesses, allowing them to thrive. That means building a better, brighter future for California, providing hardworking Americans with more opportunities. But our ability to do all that relies on the support of grassroots supporters, like you, Friend, chipping in what you can to help fight off Pelosi's army and defend this seat from the Far Left. With the FEC 's end of quarter deadline just 48 hours away and the House Majority within reach, we need you to take action. == We flipped this seat from BLUE to RED, and now Nancy Pelosi is dead set on defeating us. California's 39th Congressional District is the second most blue seat held by a Republican making it a toss-up and a top-target. Pelosi's flooded this district with $20+ million over the last four years and is ready to spend even more to buy this seat out from under us -- because control of the House Majority could come down to this seat. == The FEC's end of quarter deadline is just 48 hours away and we remain one of Pelosi's top-targets. Thank you, Taylor Team Young During this time of uncertainty, many American families are struggling to make ends meet. Please contribute only if you are able. If you are unable to donate at this time, we could still use your support --== Paid for by Young Kim for Congress PO Box 2186 Fullerton CA, 92837 == ** | | Young Kim for Congress | PO Box 2186, Fullerton, CA 92837 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: The Targets to End Walz' Emergency Powers
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=january_showdown_tar&n=1)
---
Peter \-- January is quickly approaching, which means it's time to deal a MAJOR BLOW to the political machine in St Paul and Tyrant Tim Walz. All the work over the past year that led to us removing four Walz cronies from office, will culminate in a showdown once the legislature meets...
## ONE WEEK FROM TODAY!
The math is finally on our side to End Walz' Emergency Powers once and for all. We've already had six Democrats vote our way, which means we only need four of them to continue voting that way...and we've WON! If we fail, our beloved businesses who are under assault from Tyrant Walz and our awful Attorney General will likely fail and go bankrupt. And the liberties we are losing everyday that this lockdown continues, will be lost for good. The stakes are incredibly high! Capitol insiders are telling us right now that some of the Democrats who voted the right way in the past, aren't so certain they are going to vote the right way now that the election is over and the new legislative session is beginning. Are you kidding me??? **These politicians: Reps Marquart, Sandstede, Lislegard and Ecklund** are starting to waiver. Are they really going to put Governor Walz ahead of their own constituents??? We need your help to remind them that Governor Walz' illegal and immoral lockdown is harming Minnesota. The legislature MUST strip him of his powers immediately to stop the pain.
## Here are the Games They'll Play
* ### Kill the Resolution
* ### Avoid Hearing it
* ### Water it Down - Fake End Powers Bill
* ### BLACK OUT

As you and I are reaching out to these Democrats, so is Governor Tim Walz. He's getting nervous that his powers are going to be eliminated - he won't go down without a fight. Democrats are going to do their best to **Kill the Resolution** to End Walz' Emergency Powers. However, angry voters are more powerful than anything Walz can promise them (campaign funds, committee assignments, etc). So your calls and emails are key! **If they can't kill the bill, Democrat leaders will try to avoid an actual vote by using parliamentary procedures. Tell these Democrat targets that they MUST stand up against Democrat leadership so we get a clean vote on Ending Walz' Emergency Powers.** When killing and avoiding doesn't work, Democrat, and even Republican leadership, will start watering down the Resolution. We're starting to hear that weak-kneed Republicans are preparing to cut backroom deals with the Democrats on a Fake End Walz' Powers bill. It's bad enough that the Republicans in Washington D.C. just sold us out - massive stimulus bill with billions of dollars going overseas - we can't let them make deals with Democrats in St Paul. Tell these Democrat targets that we DEMAND a clean vote on the End Walz' Emergency Powers Resolution. No compromise! And if you have a Republican Rep, make sure he or she only supports a clean vote on Ending Walz' Emergency Powers. Lastly, the political establishment will try to **BLACK OUT** the vote by avoiding a roll call. House rules require 15 members to raise their hands in order to get a recorded vote. When politicians don't want to be held accountable, they avoid roll call votes so nothing is shown on the record. We MUST DEMAND a roll call vote on every single procedural move. **To recap, on January 5th when the Legislature convenes, we DEMAND a clean vote on the End Walz' Emergency Powers Resolution. No gimmicks, no fake bills, no refusal to obtain a roll call vote. It's time everyone is on board to finally end the pain.** Please do me a favor. If everyone who reads this email calls, texts and/or emails these four Democrats, we can finally put an End to Walz' Emergency Powers once and for all. Democrat Reps Gene Pelowski and Mike Sundin have already told their constituents that they'll vote the right way (we'll be watching to make sure they do!). So we need you to contact these four other Democrats immediately:
### **Rep Paul Marquart - 701-371-1949 -[pmarquart@hotmail.com](mailto:pmarquart@hotmail.com)******
### **Rep Julie Sandstede - 218-969-7009 -[julie4house@gmail.com](mailto:julie4house@gmail.com)**
### **Rep Dave Lislegard - 218-343-7965 -[davefor6b@gmail.com](mailto:davefor6b@gmail.com)**
### **Rep Rob Ecklund - 218-341-6133 -[randjecklund@yahoo.com](mailto:randjecklund@yahoo.com) **
## Fill up their inboxes and phone lines with this message:
Script: Rep _______, I'm reaching out to you as a concerned Minnesotan who believes our state is in bad shape with Governor Walz making unilateral decisions. His orders are harming our economy and they are anti-democratic. You've voted to End Walz' Emergency Powers before, but now we have the real chance to finally end them when the legislature meets on January 5th. Can you confirm that you are still going to vote the right way by voting YES on the End Walz' Emergency Powers Resolution. And will you stand up against all attempts by Democrat leadership to kill the Resolution, so there is a clean vote? Alternate Script: Rep ________, I've watched you vote to End Walz' Emergency Powers when it came up previously. And I thank you for doing the right thing. This recent lockdown shows that Governor Walz' powers are abusive and causing great harm to Minnesota. Will you confirm that you'll vote to End Walz' Emergency Powers again when the legislature meets on January 5th? I heard that other legislators are going to try to derail the vote or amend it so Walz continues to have his powers. Will you stand up against these attempts so Minnesota citizens get a clean vote on the End Walz' Emergency Powers Resolution? **Thank you in advance for helping us out. If this is not your cup of tea, help out with our[pressure campaign by donating here](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=january_showdown_tar&n=2). As you can imagine, we'll need to bring some heat against the final holdouts in this fight.** **In Liberty,

** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=january_showdown_tar&n=3).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=january_showdown_tar&n=4).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=january_showdown_tar&n=5), software for leaders.

subject: Major goal - Can you help?

body:
Frankly, I'm worried with the direction in which we're headed. If we let Kamala Harris, Chuck Schumer, and Nancy Pelosi lead us into the future, we could reach a dangerous point of no return. Don't sit this fight out - Democrats are ONE state away from total control.
Friend,

I'm pouring over the numbers, and what I'm seeing has me worried. We're NOT on track to reach the critical End of Year goal.

**As of this morning, we need 97 MORE PATRIOTS from your area to step up today, or we will be in serious danger of falling short.** **[Will you rush a 7X MATCHED donation before midnight tonight?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yUSfX-oj6OM68g-btZ6GqtJHlIe-SSHXAPo9w4yHjPu9xARsyu9QU4aQXaaBF2Fwz6MahTri3PKsMiyA4RyBNCrtyoY15t3OO_XX-51M1BlB1L-b6mfFX8X7VpgWUKCTYFA1i7LsTC4ek31LR4i_ho1CfEiKSgOeb2XQZM1rBhc1wxNNy0-xK6VpA3lpTyDebM9sIM1KrC6ZeF1vKpz8L25Zugoo-Vt_oMv5BnE_A9eOXcX9XmfBbEMDumTuTCJy-hBV59pP_06tBc4h2dbB6bNCzhAGxTohSa_dQT-eKStfmj3dNtrpvksk7n5QpHoxiDA6LPSQyWmKiommHuvVJkuv1NUZReHedIc7iozSqosfA6FiHDRD5AFPVGnfug_7EXV5xEendx9PZ1unueVB4g==&c=KwIDZyHElTYcbFLB0Mt0dctlF3LNc6q0x-Ug16Zdtu-ayqscTXs7lA==&ch=i9_TC122-ClbQBXVtfoj7f0LzvP3jGNHArtJExDw2q-jeXZ_iuo0Yg==)**

This is the biggest deadline we've EVER faced, and it could not have come at a more critical time:
* The Georgia runoff elections are just 7 days away
* Democrats have poured MILLIONS into flipping this battleground state
* Liberal megadonors and Hollywood elites are breaking the bank to help Democrats take full control of our country's agenda

[**We need the resources to make our last stand in Georgia. Rush an emergency 7OO% matched donation before midnight so we can reach this last major goal!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yUSfX-oj6OM68g-btZ6GqtJHlIe-SSHXAPo9w4yHjPu9xARsyu9QU4aQXaaBF2Fwz6MahTri3PKsMiyA4RyBNCrtyoY15t3OO_XX-51M1BlB1L-b6mfFX8X7VpgWUKCTYFA1i7LsTC4ek31LR4i_ho1CfEiKSgOeb2XQZM1rBhc1wxNNy0-xK6VpA3lpTyDebM9sIM1KrC6ZeF1vKpz8L25Zugoo-Vt_oMv5BnE_A9eOXcX9XmfBbEMDumTuTCJy-hBV59pP_06tBc4h2dbB6bNCzhAGxTohSa_dQT-eKStfmj3dNtrpvksk7n5QpHoxiDA6LPSQyWmKiommHuvVJkuv1NUZReHedIc7iozSqosfA6FiHDRD5AFPVGnfug_7EXV5xEendx9PZ1unueVB4g==&c=KwIDZyHElTYcbFLB0Mt0dctlF3LNc6q0x-Ug16Zdtu-ayqscTXs7lA==&ch=i9_TC122-ClbQBXVtfoj7f0LzvP3jGNHArtJExDw2q-jeXZ_iuo0Yg==)

Frankly, I'm worried with the direction in which we're headed. If we let Kamala Harris, Chuck Schumer, and Nancy Pelosi lead us into the future, we could reach a dangerous point of no return. _**Don 't sit this fight out - Democrats are ONE state away from total control.**_

This is the final critical fundraising deadline before election day in Georgia, and we need your support now more than ever before.

I'm counting on YOU to be one of the 97 Patriots from your area to join the frontlines of this fight. [**Rush a contribution of ANY amount right now to be 7X-MATCHED and help reach this goal.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yUSfX-oj6OM68g-btZ6GqtJHlIe-SSHXAPo9w4yHjPu9xARsyu9QU4aQXaaBF2Fwz6MahTri3PKsMiyA4RyBNCrtyoY15t3OO_XX-51M1BlB1L-b6mfFX8X7VpgWUKCTYFA1i7LsTC4ek31LR4i_ho1CfEiKSgOeb2XQZM1rBhc1wxNNy0-xK6VpA3lpTyDebM9sIM1KrC6ZeF1vKpz8L25Zugoo-Vt_oMv5BnE_A9eOXcX9XmfBbEMDumTuTCJy-hBV59pP_06tBc4h2dbB6bNCzhAGxTohSa_dQT-eKStfmj3dNtrpvksk7n5QpHoxiDA6LPSQyWmKiommHuvVJkuv1NUZReHedIc7iozSqosfA6FiHDRD5AFPVGnfug_7EXV5xEendx9PZ1unueVB4g==&c=KwIDZyHElTYcbFLB0Mt0dctlF3LNc6q0x-Ug16Zdtu-ayqscTXs7lA==&ch=i9_TC122-ClbQBXVtfoj7f0LzvP3jGNHArtJExDw2q-jeXZ_iuo0Yg==)

Marco Rubio

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. **Thankfully we’re only _3_ days away from the end of 2020!**

I know all of us are ready to put this year behind us and move forward, but I’m afraid I need to warn you, Peter. Nancy Pelosi still has control of the House, albeit a slimmer majority, but now Joe Biden and Democrats will also control the White House!

**What does that mean for us?**

**They're going to try to turn America into a Socialist Nightmare!**

name: Dr. Philip Chan, RIDOH
subject: Vaccine Update
body:
---
| | | | | | Hello friend,
My name is Dr. Philip Chan, and I'm one of the infectious diseases physicians and medical directors at the Rhode Island Department of Health. I've been working closely with our immunization team to roll out the COVID-19 vaccine here in Rhode Island. Governor Raimondo asked me to provide you with an update on our progress thus far.
This has been a challenging year filled with frustration and loss for so many of us, including me. I know first-hand how strenuous it's been on our frontline healthcare providers, who are working around the clock to keep Rhode Islanders safe and healthy. But as we look toward 2021, I am filled with optimism that our vaccination efforts will turn things around.
We are currently using two COVID-19 vaccines in Rhode Island: one made by Pfizer and one made by Moderna. After weeks of scrutiny -- extensive clinical trials with tens of thousands of participants followed by teams of FDA scientists examining the vaccine's effectiveness, safety, potential side effects, and manufacturing process and an independent review by Rhode Island's COVID-19 Vaccine Subcommittee -- we've found that both vaccines are safe. Both are enormously effective (~95%). This is a huge step forward in the fight against COVID-19!
Because we began planning for this months ago, our vaccination campaign hit the ground running. Rhode Island currently has one of the best state-level immunization programs in the country. We've vaccinated nearly 13,000 people already and have 14,000 doses of the two vaccines coming into Rhode Island each week.
We started off vaccinating high-risk workers in hospitals, and this week started vaccinating residents and staff in nursing homes. We're planning to administer initial doses of the vaccine at all nursing homes by mid-January. This week, we also started clinics for home health and hospice workers, EMS personnel, and first responders.
Once we've protected our healthcare workers, we're going to move to additional populations who work or live in higher-risk settings. We have a major focus on equity. That means not only making sure that the communities and sectors hardest hit have access to vaccine first but also making sure that every person in every neighborhood in Rhode Island has access to a vaccine. Transportation issues or lack of health insurance will not be barriers for anyone. The vaccine will be available to all Rhode Islanders regardless of insurance status, and no one will have to pay out of pocket.
As the vaccine becomes more available in the coming weeks, we will continue to provide regular updates about who can get vaccinated and where. We plan to make vaccines as accessible as possible at local doctor's offices, pharmacies, community clinics, and more. But we are all going to need to be patient. Rhode Islanders will be vaccinated over the course of months, not weeks.
The pandemic has truly been a marathon, and while we've come so far already, we still have a little ways to go. Marathons are the toughest right before the end, but soon the finish line will be in sight. Between now and then, we need to stay focused - wear masks, practice physical distancing - in addition to getting vaccinated when it's our turn. So thank you, everyone, for your patience and diligence during this time. We are getting through this together!
Dr. Philip A. Chan, MD, MS Medical Director, RIDOH
---
|
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---
| [Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=f5e74fd4-1987-4041-8417-aaf1be5b6861)

Friend, we need your help now more than ever to reach our critical end of year fundraising goal. Without your support, we will not have the resources to continue fighting back against the Radical Left in New Jersey! == Help Jeff meet his 2020 fundraising deadline >>> == Team Van Drew can't stress enough the importance of your contribution. Your donation is what will help determine whether or not our team has the resources to continue fighting to defend President Trump and for a Strong America. If you have ever thought about supporting Conservative Congressman Jeff Van Drew, now is the time. This is your LAST chance before the New Year. **Making Waves in 2021 🌊**
Friend,

2020 was a challenging year, but we still managed to achieve a lot thanks to your support.

[Will you help us get off to a strong start in 2021 with a donation today?](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=fe08e909d050427ea23f615866f87ee4&_e=StzMv0_pxGdof9YhK0sStmedbv1aJpK9KyTNUz3ROxE9p0UiptINufHFjb8k7kO5ASlAqWRO0jVrQs_H5TKAUsj5D1AGEToVWa2l6Dg8prSPriuzdsvpWEznXixBzfnsdrozUb_cXgOlLQsZhW35ZtxFuL3gU958x-vMHr4Y1Qkkm7DpnikkioCsZ9sPQ0FY9e6M8VBXR7TdwxSrjaMDWyAwEDEch9sz35AxvnF6fHb2qhZsds-O7eBOwu185M8UBtfLe3ONEf53aooiBIKEzFh6KaUCSTwcVJlFFWx_Do8%3D)

**Our campaign has set a goal of raising $2021 before the year is up and we would really appreciate it if you could help us reach it.**
[Donate Today](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=fe08e909d050427ea23f615866f87ee4&_e=StzMv0_pxGdof9YhK0sStmedbv1aJpK9KyTNUz3ROxE9p0UiptINufHFjb8k7kO5ASlAqWRO0jVrQs_H5TKAUlk20AsBh6gv30PQ9Tlb_EXUDd6vpEAizxM2OQNqR7gF-aVIPDB8Eh_UtKnWqHSrjwypKAjBerfxq9WMeRAJWc0B5TIAHrxZwhbg3nGgKjNpkriwKwUduu6mQ9NWZAsCR4669cvDv92G8hRguSjQ4NqKTRuhD6_0DEbG34YUMcLfII8SZl44UaBTwgaQGwr_oQE4awPY9qgnhD_jPQzYvyg%3D)
You can bet Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Nancy Pelosi have all kinds of tricks up their sleeves. If we don’t start preparing now, we’ll be on the defensive from day one. **I need your help to kick start 2021 with a strong message: we will not give in.**

Remember, Democrats far out-raised Republicans in 2020, and my Democrat opponent got more votes than any other Democrat in the district EVER. Thankfully, we still won and the GOP flipped 12 House seats. Just imagine what we can accomplish if we can catch up in the fundraising department.

**We could flip the House and retire Nancy Pelosi once and for all!**

[I know expenses run high around this time of the year, but if you could spare just $25 it will help me and my team fight for our conservative values at a time when it matters most.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=fe08e909d050427ea23f615866f87ee4&_e=StzMv0_pxGdof9YhK0sStmedbv1aJpK9KyTNUz3ROxE9p0UiptINufHFjb8k7kO5ASlAqWRO0jVrQs_H5TKAUtTeclsZ4ikjzOmL9Nbh1cEdC7CY2ENmxKVyflnOsFGkIJCL2WkX98Wk1VxVTeUorkqkbSWNUPo8mA1pabwEBC8IuF1RxyfuLdHXrzb1JQ9lkU_UcjltBfjcb80cggxB1wq0xF8hLksk66dO1yWC0envR7BXCPqApbjONOrAY5TozHfbo1BcQCvE_wVBZ-CJkM5oRhkiF3c9VBpYKY9IsMU%3D)

**By reporting strong numbers to the FEC on Dec. 31 we can show that Americans are ready to fight for our country, small government, and religious liberty.**

That’s why we set this goal and that’s why we’re hoping you can help us reach it.
[Donate Today](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=fe08e909d050427ea23f615866f87ee4&_e=StzMv0_pxGdof9YhK0sStmedbv1aJpK9KyTNUz3ROxE9p0UiptINufHFjb8k7kO5ASlAqWRO0jVrQs_H5TKAUlDjPL3Tdv_SRrqtYO9I6W7nO6I4I2af0_tpO8d5LKMP4ckvZzlFRcKp3Qrj4Tn8l2i8OgByXn4hgayy0Yp8IO-QXopxXKCuHy2vu-1M1BUDznHmjc-fjCPtR72Excmd-fGxDl1LX39yetzrYRL_iijvp0O74mo8gKPsKciIfDQy_m9CWyOhlHOuMGQJftlpd9Z5JaWcjDrSom3PsSIQU-Y%3D)
Thank you for your ongoing support,
Tim Burchett

[P.S. Your donation today will help me combat socialist policies like Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Let’s show the liberals what we’re made of. Thank you in advance!](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=fe08e909d050427ea23f615866f87ee4&_e=StzMv0_pxGdof9YhK0sStmedbv1aJpK9KyTNUz3ROxE9p0UiptINufHFjb8k7kO5ASlAqWRO0jVrQs_H5TKAUo7Wk1WhEJEz26-9rYZRbIwZPWjiNF3gGA8QGOZdykztJcejheiCqbJU15L_8fhXliIUYyvdpjvnWN0qIyw3Xnh3zUuhWqML1EXSXwBaU6tz6rm4amW9kEztI5M80Ec-GNPCQjbtVOydEwiNFuysRkCxSxS4uGA5zYhQwjDyDnZS2CNyTcX_7R8NsmQ7MEVkGghGv-efa-0Ey77VxfcQ5Ps%3D)

| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE TUESDAY, DECEMBER 29, 2020
PHOTO RELEASE: KELLY LOEFFLER MAKES CAMPAIGN STOPS IN METRO AREA
ATLANTA - Today, conservative businesswoman and political outsider Kelly Loeffler was in the metro area for three campaign stops to encourage early voting. She started the morning in Cherokee County before heading to Paulding and then Coweta County - where she was greeted by a strong crowd of fired-up patriots. All of these events, part of Senator Loeffler's Senate Firewall Tour, drew dozens of supporters who are ready to hold the line and deliver a strong win on January 5th. body:
but time's running out.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SFH_UH20zB5BC_SMvU_1t2VqrXmm9eKaajyX0QZ88XxlWLr1Cm7ahfYHHZ5XGwb87BNDviDo5vHlTVBCR7cRy8hjVGsEJESf_ehj-0KtDZ06eQ-xyXcUaaUTfbad2sIB-g2gKAS39CkT-4xEq_KUW0KOU41iruNFKYR3ksaoAamM3976uXS6gSiCqtYpza6PFklSx-Vt5ZskrsWY40fZon40PQlYafdIm-xcAW6Yg99oQSJqiNn426LIuXSimY2wDBwfdzZN9-KruZa6gCta8KrhfyUpwX3_tRLTCGkAXoMAgUULMb9czRhdFqleiTnS6cx0XO73QjxABUgQX-YRf0R3lxSWQO5Xn-bK8-IDgh1XCyfleT9S641OTUJrVVmoIQ4QXp9H9G_eqlEAxBCw4P3xM99mt-Y4lkVem43cRo6qTXzBt9yN06kyPT26Oc1KjhgUmQiYiMbpl3y2ZwYNDDO20-G3PzYikpIbjCFd2lKFoTgsERw1kA==&c=LpVWNyqXYw0HcmpQ-CrC8p1cmMyiQEgA_d_FZ7REtHkUsJHLtxTuoA==&ch=IZwi0uwuvSzbTt1sb1hdDBUonq41ZHQatTarwM3FScE7-0jNvnffdA==)

This is Ronny Jackson, Congressman-Elect for the most pro-Trump district in the nation. I recently served as a former Senior Advisor to President Trump, and also as his White House physician -- _**and I can tell you that President Trump 's fight to uncover voter fraud is not over. **_ I fully support President Trump's attempts to ensure the integrity of our elections, and I believe that the American people are seeing just how dishonest the Fake News media is for ignoring serious and damaging allegations of election fraud all across the country. **That 's why I've just signed on to a letter with 25 other incoming Congressmen to DEMAND that Nancy Pelosi officially opens an investigation into these allegations of voter fraud. ** It's time that Congress STEPS UP and does its job in protecting our nation from corrupt political activists who are trying to steal this election away from President Trump. | Hoosier Republican,

88% of county elected offices statewide. Flipping 19 mayoral seats -- with 71 Republican mayors (23 more than the Democrats).

Winning every statewide elected office. Expanding our supermajority in the Indiana House, and maintaining our supermajority in the Indiana Senate.

Defeating Democrat Joe Donnelly and electing Senator Mike Braun.

Electing Victoria Spartz in the 5th District, and reelecting our Republican congressional delegation.

Being the first on the board again for President Trump and Vice President Pence.

And, of course, reelecting Governor Eric Holcomb with the most votes EVER cast for governor in Indiana history.

These successes have been a total team effort -- and together, we've proved that there's no limit to what we can achieve through hard work and strategic planning. With our entire team -- in ALL 92 counties -- our Indiana Republican Party earned victories across the board.

**We've[put together a report](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d5a947a38a&e=1acd9bb3d6) detailing that success, and more importantly -- how we got there, and how we keep it going....together. It's our [Indiana GOP Stakeholder Report](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=db9ac1ad37&e=1acd9bb3d6).**
[>> READ THE INDIANA GOP STAKEHOLDER REPORT >>](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=14d5a809f9&e=1acd9bb3d6)
As a key member of our Indiana Republican Party, and a key part of this success, we wanted to share this report with you. Read it [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e2ec36af50&e=1acd9bb3d6), and please feel free to share it with your Republicans friends, too.

Thank you for being an important member of our Indiana Republican team.

Happy New Year's,

Kyle Hupfer,
Chairman, Indiana Republican Party
---

name: Rob Portman
subject: all eyes on OHIO
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rob Portman for Senate
body:
From the second our nation found out we were going to have two Senate runoff races in Georgia, we knew they would be a challenge, but I don’t think an Peter, From the second our nation found out we were going to have two Senate runoff races in Georgia, we knew they would be a challenge, but I don’t think anyone was aware of just how tough it would be. All eyes are on these two races that have the power to change the trajectory of our nation. Will our nation value conservatism over radicalism? Freedom over bigger, more intrusive Government? Peter, this fate rests not just in the hands of Georgia voters, but it also rests in ours. You have the ability right here, right now to make the difference and help us retain our Senate majority. **[Will you consider chipping in JUST $25 at this very moment to help me defend my friends clean_body: From the second our nation found out we were going to have two Senate runoff races in Georgia, we knew they would be a challenge, but I don’t think an Peter, From the second our nation found out we were going to have two Senate runoff races in Georgia, we knew they would be a challenge, but I don’t think anyone was aware of just how tough it would be. All eyes are on these two races that have the power to change the trajectory of our nation. Will our nation value conservatism over radicalism? Freedom over bigger, more intrusive Government? Peter, this fate rests not just in the hands of Georgia voters, but it also rests in ours. You have the ability right here, right now to make the difference and help us retain our Senate majority. No amount is too little. Your support RIGHT NOW could mean the difference in both of these crucial runoff results. Rob Portman | | Paid for by Rob Portman for Senate

name: Lt. Col. Allen West (Ret.), My Faith Votes
subject: This Really Touched Me
body:
| | [](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201229apl01nd&n=1) Peter, Did you see the email yesterday from Lori in Minnesota, one of our great volunteers helping to get out the vote in Georgia? I am including it below because it really touched me. The foundation of this Constitutional Republic is the people. All legitimacy is dependent upon our consent, and it only moves forward with our involvement and participation. Lori is a shining example of what it means to be a citizen, and volunteers like her are the heart and soul of this organization. [**Tomorrow is the hard stop date for mailing our letters from Lori and thousands of other volunteers from 48 states. If we do not hit our financial goal, we will not have the funds for the postage. I urge you to help us send every single postcard by making a donation now. In just hours, time will be up.**](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201229apl01nd&n=2 "Donate Now!") [](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201229apl01nd&n=3)[](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201229apl01nd&n=4) Steadfast and loyal, Lt. Col. Allen West (Ret.)
National Spokesperson
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201229apl01nd&n=5)
* * *
**From:** My Faith Votes
**To:** Lt. Col. Allen West (Ret)
**Subject:** As a Christian, I must share this:
**Date** : 12/28/2020 Allen, My name is Lori and for the past year and a half I’ve been following My Faith Votes on the internet from Minnesota. From the beginning, I’ve felt the awesome presence of the Holy Spirit within this organization, and I value the opportunity to fight for our Lord by preserving the nation He gifted us. In working with other volunteers, I have felt an abundance of support, encouragement, prayer, strength, fellowship, and divine focus – and as a result, I’ve never felt so safe in my faith. I’m sharing this with you because I want you to get a sense of the people on the ground helping to turn strategies into action, and in turn **I would like to humbly ask for your support in our current, all-hands-on-deck efforts in Georgia.** When My Faith Votes reached out about helping to write and send handwritten postcards to targeted Georgia voters in the lead-up to the January 5th runoff, I knew it was a calling to do something good for God and country and I wanted to be a part of it. What a simple and personal way to reach out from one Christian voter to another. It’s not every day that voters in one state have the ability and opportunity to make such a momentous impact, and I wanted to do my part to remind them how important this runoff is for the entire nation. [**So now, as we reach the mailing deadline, I ask you to help ensure our efforts pay off by making an emergency donation to My Faith Votes. And if we can raise $100,000 in grassroots donations it will unlock a matching grant from a very generous donor.**](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201229apl01nd&n=6) As you consider this investment, some people might feel like their vote doesn’t matter, but the truth is that these special runoff elections could be decided by just a handful of votes, and what we do all matters to God. In thinking about this, I am reminded of 2 Kings 6:8–23, in which Elisha is surrounded by the enemies in Dothan, and the Lord answers him, “Do not be afraid, for those who are with us are more than those who are with them.” . . .“and he (Elisha) saw...the mountain was full of horses and chariots of fire all around (him).” For the last year and a half, as I’ve been following My Faith Votes and now an active volunteer, I know how empowering it is. I want Christians in Georgia to feel the same way. [**As we reach them, Christian to Christian, I know we can make a difference on January 5th. Please help us make it happen with an emergency donation today.**](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201229apl01nd&n=7) Your generosity and prayers are fueling an incredible organization with a wonderful mission, and I thank you. [](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201229apl01nd&n=8) Blessings, Lori D.
Minnesota State Coordinator P.S. Please stand with My Faith Votes through an additional [special gift today](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201229apl01nd&n=9 "Donate Now!")! Your investment will make all the difference in this critical upcoming election.
---
* * *
You subscribed [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) to receive email updates from My Faith Votes. Our goal is to provide valuable content that equips you to prayerfully and thoughtfully take action in the public square. To update your subscription preferences or unsubscribe, click below.

[Update Subscription Preferences or Unsubscribe](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201229apl01nd&n=10)

© 2020 My Faith Votes, 10940 S Parker Rd, #640, Parker, CO 80134, United States
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201229apl01nd&n=11) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwN_lnjJXuwm9W1LbYtLdGxMjm5tk5gSII0q4CUWEUH1EM&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201229apl01nd&n=12) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201229apl01nd&n=13) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=ShFaE4UMkbUbrBGAfRo6cWtpYpG_86vVborl4qh6VMvTodsDIy60QzMHxkiHaL0UXpB3C5GFDWiEmkpisLd3BpmWcMBxsv4tZZBXg91jBhs&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201229apl01nd&n=14) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201229apl01nd&n=15) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=efIEplPzPLFMJBCThSjOzy9X6lEnjQLWVanwmfJV3rpiB00uQL2SsKOfB5-et1FU&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201229apl01nd&n=16)

name: Team Warner
subject: A few quick things about GA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Senate runoffs are days away!
|
---

| | Derek,

We know you've been hearing about this a lot, so we'll keep it brief. Here are a few quick things about Georgia, Derek:
* The GA Senate runoff elections are on **_January 5th -- just 7 days away_**.
* To flip the Senate, we must **_win both races_**.
* Without a Democratic Senate majority, **_we won't be able to pass major legislation_** or move America forward on the path to progress.

On January 5th, it's critical that we elect Reverend Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff to deliver a blue Senate to President-elect Joe Biden and Vice President-elect Kamala Harris.

**We need your help to make this a reality. Can you split a donation to support Georgia Democrats and flip the Senate?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between the Democratic Party of Georgia, the Warnock and Ossoff campaigns, and Mark Warner:_
---
[DONATE $5](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d951/53d9897e/5532b74c/1c88d871/4173142680/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk2MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-garunoff?express_lane=true&refcode=20201229_f_1_nd__960__&refcode2=express_lane_1&amount=5") | ** ** | [DONATE $10](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d951/53d9897e/5532b74c/1c88d870/4173142680/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk2MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-garunoff?express_lane=true&refcode=20201229_f_1_nd__960__&refcode2=express_lane_2&amount=10")
[DONATE $25](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d951/53d9897e/5532b74c/1c88d87f/4173142680/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk2MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-garunoff?express_lane=true&refcode=20201229_f_1_nd__960__&refcode2=express_lane_3&amount=25") | ** ** | [DONATE $50](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d951/53d9897e/5532b74c/1c88d87e/4173142680/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk2MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-garunoff?express_lane=true&refcode=20201229_f_1_nd__960__&refcode2=express_lane_4&amount=50")
[DONATE $100](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d951/53d9897e/5532b74c/1c88d87d/4173142680/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk2MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-garunoff?express_lane=true&refcode=20201229_f_1_nd__960__&refcode2=express_lane_5&amount=100") | ** ** | [CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d951/53d9897e/5532b74c/1c88d87c/4173142680/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk2MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-garunoff?refcode=20201229_f_1_nd__960__&refcode2=express_lane_other")
We're almost at the finish line in Georgia, and we can't afford to lose steam now. It's our last shot to flip the Senate so we can make real progress in our country and repair the damage done by the Trump administration.

**[Help win the runoffs (and flip the Senate) by making a split contribution today.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d951/53d9897e/5532b74c/1c88d87b/4173142680/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk2MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-garunoff?refcode=20201229_f_1_nd__960__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

Thank you,
Team Warner

On January 5th, it's critical that we elect Reverend Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff to deliver a blue Senate to President-elect Joe Biden and Vice President-elect Kamala Harris. We need your help to make this a reality. Can you split a donation to support Georgia Democrats and flip the Senate? | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between the Democratic Party of Georgia, the Warnock and Ossoff campaigns, and Mark Warner: "" | | "" "" | | "" "" | | "" We're almost at the finish line in Georgia, and we can't afford to lose steam now. It's our last shot to flip the Senate so we can make real progress in our country and repair the damage done by the Trump administration. ""** Thank you, Team Warner "" | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 "" | | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Our budget breakdown
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, our work is
100% funded by grassroots contributions — people like you chipping in $5,
$15, or even $50 at a time because they believe in the power of electing
diverse, working-class champions like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Cori Bush,
and Jamaal Bowman.

We set ambitious but realistic fundraising goals each month to help us
cover our monthly costs and also plan for the future. Our average
contribution this year is just $18.

Here’s a breakdown of a few of the places where your donations go each
month:

Our goal is to raise $260,000 this month to cover these expenses and begin
to plan and grow our work for the 2022 cycle. We have less than three days
to reach our goal, and we still need to raise $61,249 to meet this
critical goal.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/38936?refcode=em20201229-15735&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=15735%2E1203867%2EiK8H7M ]Peter, our
work isn’t possible without you and your support. Will you contribute to
help us cover our expenses and build for the future and recruit candidates
for the 2022 cycle?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/38936?refcode=em20201229-15735&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=15735%2E1203867%2EiK8H7M ]Contribute $3

Thank you so much for your support. We’re building real power in the halls
of Congress, and it’s only possible because of grassroots donations from
supporters like you.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=15735%2E1203867%2EiK8H7M ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=15735%2E1203867%2EiK8H7M ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20201229-15735-footer&t=1024&refcode2=15735_1203867_iK8H7M&akid=15735%2E1203867%2EiK8H7M

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=15735%2E1203867%2EiK8H7M

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
P.O. Box 910 Knoxville, TN 37901
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

fraud, vote irregularities and lack of election integrity. This Democrat
party is no longer the party of JFK who said, “My fellow Americans: ask not
what your country can do for you — ask what you can do for your country.” This
Democrat party is focused on division, destruction, dependency and tearing
down individual political and economic freedom.

Many Black, Brown and Asian individuals are realizing that they are
Conservatives. We are realizing that real political and economic freedom
empowers us to thrive and flourish. We are beginning to challenge the
narrative of “Born Black, Born Democrat.” The New York Post* reports that
initial exit polls conducted by Edison Research show President Trump won at
least 18 percent of black men this year, up from 13 percent in 2016, and 8
percent of black women, doubling his percentage from four years ago. The
New York Post also notes that the president also increased his support
among Latino Americans. According to Edison Research, he captured 36
percent of Latino men and 32 percent of Latino women. These votes helped
Trump secure victories in Texas and Florida.

It is important to build on this momentum in ethnic communities. IMA
Superpac has laid the foundational work to do so.
